blocking_reasons: No 1m bar data available for any symbol. All results use 1h bars. 1h-bar backtests confirm directional edge but CANNOT predict fill accuracy, realistic slippage, or actual win rate on 1m entries.
Symbol(s) with FAIL verdict: MCL. Do not trade these symbols without strategy revision.
recommendations: Export 1m historical data from TradingView for MES and MGC: Chart → Export Data → 1 minute → last 2 years. Then re-run: python -m futures_engine.research.futures_research_runner
